title: Security-sensitive review
task: Review an authentication middleware change before it is merged.
context: The change touches request identity, token validation, and error handling around protected routes.

route.path: Security / Review > Auth middleware > Merge readiness
route.reason: Security review leads, threat modeling frames abuse cases, review handling tracks comments, and QA defines protected-route coverage.

omitted_skills.reason: The change is request security behavior, not interface design.
The task does not mention persistence performance.
